-class DenseNetEncoder(nn.Module):

-    """DenseNet-121 encoder: output stride 4, fixed spatial size via adaptive pooling."""

+class DenseNetEncoderFull(nn.Module):

+    """DenseNet-121 encoder: uses up to denseblock3 (stride 16), then reduce to d_model."""

     def __init__(self, d_model=512, pool_grid=(8, 32)):

         super().__init__()

         original = models.densenet121(weights='IMAGENET1K_V1').features

-        self.conv0 = original[0]      # Conv2d(3,64,7,stride=2,pad=3)

-        self.norm0 = original[1]      # BatchNorm2d(64)

-        self.relu0 = original[2]      # ReLU

-        self.pool0 = original[3]      # MaxPool2d(3,stride=2,pad=1) -> total stride 4

-        self.denseblock1 = original[4]  # DenseBlock with 6 layers, out-channels 256

-        self.conv_reduce = nn.Conv2d(256, d_model, kernel_size=1)

+        # Use features up to denseblock3 (inclusive)

+        self.layers = nn.Sequential()

+        for name, module in original.named_children():

+            self.layers.add_module(name, module)

+            if name == 'denseblock3':

+                break   # stop after denseblock3; output stride 16, 1024 channels

+        self.conv_reduce = nn.Conv2d(1024, d_model, kernel_size=1)

         self.pool_grid = pool_grid

         self.d_model = d_model

 

     def forward(self, x):

-        x = self.conv0(x)

-        x = self.norm0(x)

-        x = self.relu0(x)

-        x = self.pool0(x)

-        x = self.denseblock1(x)        # (B, 256, H/4, W/4)

-        x = self.conv_reduce(x)        # (B, d_model, H/4, W/4)

-        x = F.adaptive_avg_pool2d(x, self.pool_grid)  # (B, d_model, H_pool, W_pool)

+        x = self.layers(x)            # (B, 1024, H/16, W/16)

+        x = self.conv_reduce(x)       # (B, d_model, H/16, W/16)

+        x = F.adaptive_avg_pool2d(x, self.pool_grid)  # (B, d_model, ph, pw)

         B, C, H, W = x.shape

         pos_enc = get_2d_sincos_pos_encoding(C, H, W).to(x.device)

         x = x + pos_enc.unsqueeze(0)

-        self.encoder = DenseNetEncoder(d_model, pool_grid=pool_grid)

         self.d_model = d_model
